scenario.title: E-bike repair inquiry
scenario.description: Customer asks whether the shop can repair an e-bike with a clicking noise.
scenario.goal: Determine whether the employee converts a high-intent repair caller into an appointment or clear intake step.
scenario.customer_persona: Alex, a local e-bike owner hearing a clicking noise.
questions_to_ask: Could I bring it in this week?
Do I need an appointment, or should I just stop by?
success_criteria: Confirms the shop can inspect or repair the bike
Asks for bike brand or repair issue
